scripts.pull-up: docker compose pull && docker compose up -d
scripts.reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d --build
scripts.seed: docker compose exec backend python -m app.seed_demo_data
scripts.seed:all: docker compose exec backend python -m app.initial_data && docker compose exec backend python -m app.seed_phase3_4 && docker compose exec backend python -m app.seed_demo_data
scripts.dev:web: docker compose up -d --build db backend frontend
